content: {"vocabulary":[{"word":"bonjour","translation":"Hallo","pronunciation":"bɔ̃.ʒuʁ","partOfSpeech":"interjection","example":"Bonjour, comment allez-vous ?","exampleTranslation":"Hallo, wie geht es Ihnen?","usageNote":"Wird am Morgen und tagsüber verwendet."},{"word":"bonsoir","translation":"Guten Abend","pronunciation":"bɔ̃.swaʁ","partOfSpeech":"interjection","example":"Bonsoir, Madame.","exampleTranslation":"Guten Abend, Frau.","usageNote":"Wird abends verwendet."},{"word":"au revoir","translation":"Auf Wiedersehen","pronunciation":"o.ʁə.vwaʁ","partOfSpeech":"interjection","example":"Au revoir, merci !","exampleTranslation":"Auf Wiedersehen, danke!","usageNote":"Wird beim Verlassen sagen."},{"word":"salut","translation":"Hallo","pronunciation":"saly","partOfSpeech":"interjection","example":"Salut ! Comment ça va ?","exampleTranslation":"Hallo! Wie geht es dir?","usageNote":"Freundlich, aber informell."},{"word":"merci","translation":"Danke","pronunciation":"mɛʁ.si","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Merci beaucoup.","exampleTranslation":"Vielen Dank.","usageNote":"Verwendet sich für Danksagung."},{"word":"s'il vous plaît","translation":"Bitte","pronunciation":"sil.vu.plɛ","partOfSpeech":"phrase","example":"S'il vous plaît, un verre d'eau.","exampleTranslation":"Bitte, ein Glas Wasser.","usageNote":"Wird zum Höflichkeitsform verwenden."},{"word":"oui","translation":"Ja","pronunciation":"wi","partOfSpeech":"adverb","example":"Oui, je suis français.","exampleTranslation":"Ja, ich bin Franzose.","usageNote":"Einfache Zustimmung."},{"word":"non","translation":"Nein","pronunciation":"nɔ̃","partOfSpeech":"adverb","example":"Non, merci.","exampleTranslation":"Nein, danke.","usageNote":"Einfache Verneinung."},{"word":"bonne journée","translation":"Schönen Tag","pronunciation":"bɔn.ʒuʁ.nɛ","partOfSpeech":"noun phrase","example":"Bonne journée !","exampleTranslation":"Schönen Tag!","usageNote":"Wird zum Abschied gesagt."},{"word":"bonne soirée","translation":"Schöne Abend","pronunciation":"bɔn.swaʁ.nɛ","partOfSpeech":"noun phrase","example":"Bonne soirée !","exampleTranslation":"Schönen Abend!","usageNote":"Wird abends verwendet."},{"word":"comment allez-vous ?","translation":"Wie geht es Ihnen?","pronunciation":"kɔmɑ̃.a.le.vu ?","partOfSpeech":"question","example":"Comment allez-vous aujourd'hui ?","exampleTranslation":"Wie geht es Ihnen heute?","usageNote":"Höfliche Begrüßung."},{"word":"je m'appelle","translation":"Ich heiße","pronunciation":"ʒə.m.a.pɛl","partOfSpeech":"verb phrase","example":"Je m'appelle Paul.","exampleTranslation":"Ich heiße Paul.","usageNote":"Wird bei Vorstellung verwendet."},{"word":"enchanté","translation":"Freut mich","pronunciation":"ɑ̃.ʃɑ̃.te","partOfSpeech":"adjective","example":"Enchanté, Madame.","exampleTranslation":"Freut mich, Frau.","usageNote":"Wird bei ersten Treffen gesagt."},{"word":"pardon","translation":"Entschuldigung","pronunciation":"pa.dɔ̃","partOfSpeech":"interjection","example":"Pardon, où est la porte ?","exampleTranslation":"Entschuldigung, wo ist die Tür?","usageNote":"Wird zum Umgehen oder Beleidigung verwenden."},{"word":"excusez-moi","translation":"Entschuldigen Sie mich","pronunciation":"ɛk.sky.ze.mwaʁ","partOfSpeech":"phrase","example":"Excusez-moi, je suis en retard.","exampleTranslation":"Entschuldigen Sie mich, ich bin zu spät.","usageNote":"Höfliche Entschuldigung."}]}
